meaning: n.护士,保姆vt.护理,看护v.照料
examples: The nurse washed and shaved him.
She had spent 29 years as a nurse.
The executive director of Glenwood Gardens in Bakersfield defended the nurse, saying she had followed policy.
The RCHT said the casualty unit had been nurse-led between 23:00 and 09:00 for 10 years.
